9	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
10	    if verbosity == 0:
11	        return
12	    log_level = logging.INFO
13	    if verbosity > 1:
14	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
15	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
16	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
17	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
18	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
19	
20	
21	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
22	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
23	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
24	    _configure_logging(verbose)
25	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
26	
27	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
28	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
29	        agent = CliAgent(project)
30	        agent.run_forever()
31	
32	
33	@main.command()
34	def run() -> None:
35	    print("run subcommand invoked")

3. Tool messages with `role`, `id`, and `content`

15	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()

18	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])

21	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)

1	import logging

3	
4	import click
5	
6	from tim.cliagent import CliAgent
7	from tim.logviewer import html_from_log
8	from tim import MacSandboxProject
9	
10	
11	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return
14	    log_level = logging.INFO
15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21	
22	
23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	def run() -> None:
37	    print("run subcommand invoked")
38	
39	
40	@main.command()
41	@click.argument("log_file")
42	@click.option("--output", "-o", default=None, help="Output HTML file path")
43	def log(log_file: str, output: str | None) -> None:
44	    if output is None:
45	        log_path = Path(log_file)
46	        output = str(log_path.with_suffix(".html"))
47	
48	    html_content = html_from_log(log_file)
49	    Path(output).write_text(html_content, encoding="utf-8")

    agent_bezeichnung = f"{agent_name} ({agent_instanz})" if agent_instanz else agent_name

    nachricht_inhalt = _geraete_nachricht(nachrichtendaten)

    return (
        f"
"
        f"
"
        f"{html.escape(zeitstempel)}"
        f"{html.escape(agent_bezeichnung)}"
        f"
"
        f"
{nachricht_inhalt}
"
        f"
"
    )


def _sammle_agent_name(eintraege: list[dict]) -> str:
    for eintrag in eintraege:
        agent_name = eintrag.get("source", {}).get("agent", "")
        if agent_name:
            return agent_name
    return "Unknown"


def _extrahiere_zeitraum(eintraege: list[dict]) -> tuple[str, str]:
    if not eintraege:
        return "", ""
    erster_zeitstempel = eintraege[0].get("at", "")
    letzter_zeitstempel = eintraege[-1].get("at", "")
    return _formate_zeitstempel(erster_zeitstempel), _formate_zeitstempel(letzter_zeitstempel)


def html_aus_log(log_datei_pfad: str) -> str:
    log_pfad = Path(log_datei_pfad)
    dateiname = log_pfad.name
    eintraege_text = log_pfad.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    eintraege = [json.loads(zahlzeile) for zahlzeile in eintraege_text.splitlines() if zahlzeile.strip()]

    agent_name = _sammle_agent_name(eintraege)
    eintrag_anzahl = len(eintraege)
    erste_zeit, letzte_zeit = _extrahiere_zeitraum(eintraege)

    kopfzeile = (
        f"
"
        f"
Agent Log - {html.escape(agent_name)}
"
        f"
{html.escape(dateiname)} | {eintrag_anzahl} entries | {html.escape(erste_zeit)} - {html.escape(letzte_zeit)}
"
        f"
"
    )

    eintrag_blöcke = [_geraete_log_eintrag(eintrag) for eintrag in eintraege]
    koerper_inhalt = "\n".join(eintrag_blöcke)

    return (
        "\n"
        "\n"
        "\n"
        "\n"
        "\n"
        f"Agent Log - {html.escape(agent_name)}\n"
        "\n"
        "\n"
        f"{kopfzeile}\n{koerper_inhalt}\n\n"
    )
```

15	    if verbosity > 1:

20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])

23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()

11	def _configure_logging(verbosity: int) -> None:
12	    if verbosity == 0:
13	        return
14	    log_level = logging.INFO
15	    if verbosity > 1:
16	        log_level = logging.DEBUG
17	    stream_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
18	    stream_handler.addFilter(lambda record: record.name.startswith("tim."))
19	    stream_handler.setLevel(log_level)
20	    logging.basicConfig(level=log_level, handlers=[stream_handler])
21	
22	
23	@click.group(invoke_without_command=True)
24	@click.option("-v", "--verbose", count=True, default=0)
25	def main(verbose: int) -> None:
26	    _configure_logging(verbose)
27	    ctx = click.get_current_context()
28	
29	    if ctx.invoked_subcommand is None:
30	        project = MacSandboxProject.cwd()
31	        agent = CliAgent(project)
32	        agent.run_forever()
33	
34	
35	@main.command()
36	def run() -> None:
37	    print("run subcommand invoked")
38	
39	
40	@main.command()
41	@click.argument("log_file")
42	@click.option("--output", "-o", default=None, help="Output HTML file path")
43	@click.argument("output_pos", default=None, required=False)
44	def log(log_file: str, output: str | None, output_pos: str | None) -> None:
45	    output = output or output_pos
46	    if output is None:
47	        log_path = Path(log_file)
48	        output = str(log_path.with_suffix(".html"))
49	
50	    html_content = html_from_log(log_file)
51	    Path(output).write_text(html_content, encoding="utf-8")
